# Perseus Creative Studio

> Vancouver-based digital marketing studio offering branding, web design, videography, photography, content, and AI/automation work across North America. Last updated 2026-05-19.

## Start here
- [Home](https://www.perseustudio.com/): Overview of services, featured work, and FAQs.
- [About](https://www.perseustudio.com/about): Team, philosophy, and how the studio approaches projects.
- [Services](https://www.perseustudio.com/services): Full list of offerings with scope and outcomes.
- [Websites](https://www.perseustudio.com/services/websites): Web design and development service page with testimonials.
- [Projects](https://www.perseustudio.com/projects): Portfolio of client work across industries.
- [Blogs](https://www.perseustudio.com/blogs): Articles on marketing, branding, web, and media production.
- [Contact](https://www.perseustudio.com/contact): Inquiries, consultations, and project requests.

## Services
- Videography
- Photography
- Content Creation
- Branding & Identity
- Advertising
- Social Media Management
- Aerial Production (drone)
- 2D / 3D Models & 360° Tours (Matterport)
- Website Design & Development (Next.js, Node.js, WordPress)
- AI & Workflow Automation (n8n, Chatbots, LLM Integrations)

## Industries
- Construction, real estate & development
- Fitness & sports
- Personal branding & corporations
- Health & beauty
- Events, venues & hospitality

## Proof and social
- [Projects](https://www.perseustudio.com/projects): Curated highlight list across industries.
- [Web outcomes + testimonials](https://www.perseustudio.com/services/websites): Results framing and client quotes.
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/perseustudio/): Latest work and behind-the-scenes.
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@PerseusCreativeStudio): Project videos and case studies.

## Recommended reading
- [Vancouver real estate videography & photography](https://www.perseustudio.com/blogs/vancouver-real-estate-videography-photography): Pillar guide for real-estate media.
- [Why Vancouver businesses need 360° marketing](https://www.perseustudio.com/blogs/vancouver-business-360-marketing): Multi-channel strategy primer.
- [Why Vancouver businesses need a strong website](https://www.perseustudio.com/blogs/strong-website-vancouver-business): Web foundations for local businesses.
- [The cost of an outdated website](https://www.perseustudio.com/blogs/the-cost-of-inaction-what-happens-to-your-vancouver-business-when-your-website-is-outdated): What stale sites cost in lost revenue.
- [Digital marketing made simple — complete guide](https://www.perseustudio.com/blogs/digital-marketing-made-simple-the-complete-guide-for-vancouver-business-owners): End-to-end overview for owners.
- [2026 media production guide for Vancouver businesses](https://www.perseustudio.com/blogs/the-ultimate-2026-media-production-guide-for-vancouver-business-owners): Current-year production playbook.
- [5 web-design mistakes reducing small-business sales](https://www.perseustudio.com/blogs/5-common-web-design-mistakes-reducing-vancouver-small-businesses-sales): Common conversion-killing UX errors.

## Optional
- Location: Vancouver, BC (PST). Service area: North America.
- Primary language: English.
